title: Keel Toys Keeleco Christmas Snowman With Scarf 20cm Soft Toy
features: Eco-Friendly Build: Made entirely from 100% recycled polyester and glass bead weighting, it’s a thoughtful choice for environmentally conscious families.
Festive Look: Dressed in a red scarf with a snowflake design, it brings instant holiday cheer and classic winter style.
Compact Size (20cm): Just right for little hands, gift baskets, or even as a stocking filler
description: This Cute Plush Snowman is a sweet, sustainable choice for holiday gifting or nursery decor—thoughtful, huggable, and gentle on the planet. ❄️ Why It’s a Great Pick: Eco-Friendly: Made from 100% recycled polyester and filled with recycled glass beads, it’s a wonderful way to reduce plastic waste while spreading festive cheer. Charming Design: A classic snowman look, complete with a cheerful red Christmas scarf, makes it perfect for the holiday season. Baby-Safe: Suitable from birth, so it's ideal for newborn gifts, Christmas baby hampers, or as a keepsake for a baby’s first holiday. Lightly Weighted: The subtle weight gives it a comforting, floppy feel—great for snuggling or posing on a shelf.
